description: REQ-TAG-004 states the '+' add tag button shall display at the end of the tag list on each feed row. The implementation wraps both the tag chip loop AND the '+' button inside `{#if tags.length > 0}` (FeedRow.svelte:133-162). This means rows with zero tags do not show the '+' button, contradicting EC-011 ('Rows show no tag chips, only '+' button') and REQ-TAG-004's requirement that the button appears on each feed row.
